---
title: "Talks"
---

Here is a list of conference talks that I gave:

* [TODO SignVectors: a SageMath Package for Oriented Matroids](talks/ISSAC2026.pdf), ISSAC'26, Oldenburg, Germany, July 2026.
* [TODO PhD defense](talks/defense.pdf), University of Kassel, Germany, July 2026.
* [Reaction networks with (generalized) mass-action kinetics: Sign vector conditions for the existence of a unique general equilibrium](talks/ACA2025.pdf), ACA'25, Heraklion, Crete/Greece, July 2025.
* [Computing Elementary Vectors over Integral Domains](talks/CA2025.pdf), Fachtagung der Computeralgebra'25, Leipzig, Germany, June 2025.
* [A SageMath Package for Elementary and Sign Vectors with Applications to Chemical Reaction Networks](talks/ICMS2024.pdf), ICMS'24, Durham, UK, June 2024.
* [Certifying Solvability of Linear Inequality Systems with Elementary Vectors](talks/CASC2024.pdf), CASC'24, Rennes, France, September 2024.
* [Computing sign vector conditions for existence and uniqueness of equilibria of chemical reaction networks](talks/ACA2023.pdf), ACA'23, Warsaw, Poland, July 2023.
* [TODO Certifying solvability of linear inequality systems using elementary vectors](talks/CA2023.pdf), Fachtagung der Computeralgebra'23, Hannover, Germany, June 2023.
